summary: Project involves a graph/tree visualization app with Motoko backend and React frontend. Currently implementing backend query changes to filter graph nodes (locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens, curations, swarms) by caller/principal, returning only nodes created by the caller.
architectural_notes: Backend (Motoko) handles node filtering by caller principal — frontend should not filter graph data client-side
getGraphData() in GraphView.tsx and TreeView.tsx fetches nodes filtered by caller/principal from backend query

existing_features.title: Update `getGraphData()` in both `frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx` and `frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx` to call the updated backend query that filters by caller/principal, replacing the previous unfiltered call. Ensure the React Query cache key reflects the authenticated principal so the data re-fetches correctly when the user logs in or out.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update backend Motoko query to filter all graph node types by caller/principal (creator), and update getGraphData() in GraphView.tsx and TreeView.tsx to use the filtered query

Modify the backend Motoko actor to add or update the graph data query so that it accepts the caller's principal (via the implicit `caller` context in a shared query) and returns only those nodes — Locations, LawTokens, InterpretationTokens, Curations, and Swarms — where the stored creator/owner field matches the caller's principal.
